untranslatable_reason: The signal requires dynamic price target calculation based on candle pattern measurement (height / 6 + breakout_price). This requires custom order-generation logic beyond static indicator comparisons. The 'range' indicator approximates candle height but the formula-driven target calculation and breakout direction detection cannot be expressed using only the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Signal uses a measure rule that computes candle height (high - low) and derives targets via division and addition. While 'range' captures candle height, the dynamic target calculation logic (dividing height by 6 and adding to breakout price) requires custom calculation functions not available in the standard indicator set. The breakout_direction parameter should be evaluated externally to determine LONG vs SHORT entry direction. The median performance statistics provided (12.69%, 16.01%, etc.) appear to be historical backtesting results rather than entry/exit conditions.
